tasks.subject: Task 1: eqHeaderPlugin.ts — 마커 감지 + 데코레이션 + 통지
tasks.description:
Create app/src/lib/editor/eqHeader/eqHeaderPlugin.ts (isEqualsParagraph, findEqBoundary, createEqHeaderPlugin) + app/tests/unit/editor/eqHeaderBoundary.test.ts. TDD. See plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/eqHeader/eqHeaderPlugin.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/eqHeaderBoundary.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run test -- eqHeaderBoundary", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isEqualsParagraph true for 3+ equals", "findEqBoundary ignores index 0, first >=1, topmost, null", "decorations marker+active", "version + onChange"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: StickyHeader.svelte — 고정 미러 오버레이
tasks.description:
Create app/src/lib/editor/eqHeader/StickyHeader.svelte — clone header DOM, fixed overlay, scroll-detect, show on scroll-past, click-to-top. See plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/eqHeader/StickyHeader.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["null boundary renders nothing", "auto-detect scroll container", "show only scrolled past", "fixed 40vh internal scroll", "click to top", "re-clone on change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: TomboyEditor 배선 + 마커 CSS
tasks.description:
Modify app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte — register eqHeader plugin, seed state, mount StickyHeader, add .tomboy-eq-marker CSS. See plan Task 3.
